The classification of Trichogonia cinerea is further broken down into its kingdom (Plantae), phylum (Angiosperms), class (Magnoliopsida), order (Lamiales), family (Acanthaceae), genus (Trichogonia), and species (T. cinerea). The Acanthaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants that includes over 2,000 species.
